overall.description: A first-person gameplay walkthrough of a rainy night in Saint Denis from Red Dead Redemption 2. The player walks through historic cobblestone streets with gas lamps, passing a horse-drawn carriage and NPCs under awnings, creating a moody, atmospheric scene with wet reflective surfaces and dramatic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic courtyard with iron fence and gas lamps

events.description: turns left from courtyard onto cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: walking through a rainy courtyard with a large tree, turning onto a cobblestone street lined with historic buildings

entered.detail: tall tree with hanging branches in the courtyard center
three-story brick building with arched windows and iron balconies
black wrought iron fence with stone pillars
cast iron lamp post with warm yellow light
wet reflective cobblestone road surface with puddles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rainy historic courtyard dominated by a large willow tree. The camera walks past an iron fence and turns onto a cobblestone street, with warm gas lamps illuminating the wet surfaces and historic townhouses lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with tram tracks

events.description: horse-drawn carriage gallops past from right to left
moves under covered sidewalk awning for shelter from rain

agents.ego_description: walking along the street as a horse carriage passes by, then moving under the building awning

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage galloping past on the wet street

entered.detail: metal rails embedded in the cobblestone street
wooden carriage with two horses pulling it at speed
wooden awning extending over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open cobblestone street with visible tram tracks, a horse-drawn carriage suddenly gallops past from right to left. The camera then moves under a covered sidewalk awning, transitioning from exposed rain to partial shelter.

events.description: passes two NPCs standing under the awning against the building
exits covered sidewalk back onto open street

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered sidewalk, passing NPCs leaning against the building wall

notable_agents.action: two men standing under the awning, one drinking from a bottle and conversing

entered.detail: brick building with painted sign reading 'CAREFULLY PREPARED' and 'MEDICINE'
stack of sandbags near the curb edge
simple wooden bench under the awning

segments.scene_description: Moving along the sheltered sidewalk next to a brick pharmacy building, the camera passes two NPCs standing against the wall. The segment ends as the camera exits the covered area back onto the open rainy street.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with saloon and tram tracks

events.description: approaches illuminated saloon sign with golden lion hanging over street
passes directly under the saloon sign and continues down the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the main street toward an illuminated saloon sign, passing various storefronts and street lamps

entered.detail: illuminated sign with golden lion and text 'Le Lion d'Or' hanging across the street
empty wooden cart parked on the sidewalk
two-story building with green doors and ornate balcony
tall cast iron lamp post with bright electric light

segments.scene_description: Walking along the main cobblestone street with tram tracks, the camera approaches the illuminated 'Le Lion d'Or' saloon sign with its golden lion emblem. After passing under the sign and a wooden cart, the journey continues down the misty, rain-soaked street lined with historic buildings and glowing street lamps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy historic district that transitions from a secluded courtyard into the bustling, lamp-lit main streets of the city. It begins in a rainy courtyard beside a large willow tree and an iron fence, moving onto a cobblestone street where warm gas lamps reflect off the wet surfaces of surrounding townhouses. As the camera follows the tram tracks, a horse-drawn carriage gallops past before the view shifts under the partial shelter of a covered sidewalk awning. The scene then glides past a brick pharmacy and waiting NPCs before exiting the shelter and returning to the open rain. Finally, the camera approaches the glowing golden emblem of the Le Lion d'Or saloon sign and passes a wooden cart, continuing down a misty, rain-soaked street lined with glowing lamps and historic architecture.
